title: Cobblemon: Roni's Reworked Shinies
description: A resource pack that aims to change EVERY shiny pokemon
body:
My take on changing every shiny pokemon, trying not to come up with the obvious shiny ideas that everyone has

Some shinies may not be to your liking but at least its something different and none of them are like those awful subtle shinies!

**ONLY WORKS PROPERLY ON COBBLEMON 1.7.1 AND NEWER VERSIONS**

**This is how my pack should be used for the best experience, make sure to load my pack with AT LEAST the region bias pack at the SAME TIME or the packs wont load and the game CAN crash**

![Cobblemon packs along with my pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c7e1589ec64b266d640f96c62563e754e413fb8.png)

## List of currently changed shinies

<details>
<summary>Gen 1</summary>
All 151 are done :)
</details> 


<details>
<summary>Gen 2</summary>
Everyone excluding entei, suicune, raikou and celebi
  (their models are missing from base cobblemon)

### Will i add compatibility for other cobblemon addons?

Not for now, by the time im done with the base pokemon in cobblemon, some models will probably update and i'll have to remake the textures, if there are no megas or certain pokemon arent added when im done i'll consider doing mods such as Mega Showdown
